qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_plan as oi_plan, t0.c_plan as c_plan, t0.d_plan as d_plan, SEC.policy, t0.c_plan as CODE, t0.d_plan as TEXT, t0.oi_empresa as oi_empresa FROM LEG62_PLANES as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Planes.PLAN\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_plan LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_plan asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_plan as oi_plan, SEC.policy FROM LEG62_PLANES as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Planes.PLAN\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_plan LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_plan asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Planes.PLAN.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('SELECT LEG62_PLANES.oi_plan as ID, LEG62_PLANES.c_plan as COD, LEG62_PLANES.d_plan as DES, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa FROM LEG62_PLANES, ORG03_EMPRESAS JOIN LEG62_PLANES.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa
WHERE LEG62_PLANES.oi_plan in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Planes.PLAN.QUERY
